data.title: Story Ecosystem One-Stop IPFi Lending Platform Unleash Currently IP Lending Annualized 259.66%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The latest data shows that the current annualized yield (APY) of IP lending in the Unleash lending market, an IPFi platform in the Story ecosystem, is 259.66%, and users will also receive an IP reward of 14.56%.

data.title: Vitalik: Blockchain cannot have no bottom line on moral issues, the foundation will make changes to promote development
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In a text AMA held on the Tako platform, Vitalik answered the question "Have you ever been frustrated and disappointed with EF, the community, and the industry in the past year?" He said: Of course. Perhaps the most disappointing thing for me recently is that some people say that Ethereum is not good and intolerant because we do not respect the "casinos" on the blockchain enough, and other chains are happy to accept any application, so they are better. If the blockchain community has this kind of "reverse Tiangang" moral problem, I will have no interest in participating in the blockchain. But I found an interesting point: on the Internet, many people will say those words, but when I chat with the community in person, everyone's values ​​are still the same as before, so I feel that I have a responsibility to this community and cannot abandon them. Ethereum needs to work together to create the world we want to see. This will require some changes, such as the foundation may not be too neutral at the application layer, and it needs to deliberately support some things, but the project must be worth it for us to do so.

data.title: DFINITY Community Proposes New Standards for RWA and Stablecoin Ledgers
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the DFINITY community has introduced a proposal titled 'Exploring New Standards for RWA and Stablecoin Ledgers.' The proposal aims to develop new standards tailored to the unique requirements of managing Real World Asset (RWA) ledgers and stablecoin ledgers. The team is considering several management operations that could be executed by privileged parties. These include pausing and unpausing ledgers, which would temporarily halt all transaction processing while maintaining read access to the ledger's status. Additionally, the proposal suggests deactivating ledgers, which would permanently stop all transaction processing on the ledger, though its historical status would remain accessible. Other proposed operations include freezing and unfreezing accounts to restrict specific accounts from transactions, and clearing accounts to remove all tokens from particular accounts.

Foresight News notes that a ledger is a record-keeping system that tracks the flow of value, allowing observers to accurately see the amount and location of value at any given moment.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 650 USDT with a Narrowed 0.91% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 20, 2025, 07:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 650 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 650.159973 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.91% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: LBank will list Quai Network (QUAI)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch Quai Network (QUAI) at 15:40 (SGT) on February 20, and open the QUAI/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 15:00 on February 21.

data.title: Early ETH whale recharged 4254 ETH to Binance 4 hours ago, equivalent to 11.67 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the ETH OG whale in 2018 recharged 4,254 ETH to Binance 4 hours ago, worth 11.67 million US dollars. The ETH cost of this address was as low as 194 US dollars. In the past five days, it is suspected that 12,254 ETH has been sold. If estimated at the recharge price, it will make a profit of 31.1 million US dollars.

data.title: Phantom announces support for Monad testnet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Phantom Wallet announced support for the Monad test network on the X platform. Users can access and exchange MON test coins and explore Monad applications.
